title: TaCZ x Guns Lights Addon [NEW]
description: An easy addition to the game is dynamic gunshot flashes and bullet lighting effects.
body:
## 📖 What's this mod?

[NEW] Description - Just like the TaCZ x LambDynamicLights addon, this mod focuses on enhancing immersion during firefights — but instead of global dynamic lights, it specifically simulates the flash and glow produced by gunfire and projectiles.

Requires only [TaCZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero)

### 2.4.3 and later - don't work with [~~Starlight~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight-forge)
## 📷 Gif's [NEW] 

### 1. Custom Configuration Menu
![First](https://i.imgur.com/s5H4Wqt.gif)

### 2. New bullet tracing system [Optimization]
![Twice](https://i.imgur.com/6WJOAGx.gif)
![Triple](https://i.imgur.com/L28l4JZ.gif)

## ✨ Features

- 🔥 Muzzle Flash Effects – each time a weapon is fired, a short burst of light is emitted, simulating a realistic muzzle flash.
- 💡 Bullet Lights – flying projectiles dynamically illuminate their surroundings, adding tension to combat in dark environments.
- ⚡ Light Management System – optimized server-side tracking of active bullet positions to avoid performance issues.
- 🌍 Multiplayer Support – networking system ensures that both server and client see synchronized lighting effects.
